System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference R_HFE_HZx_4WD_V3_20140926T155013.json

Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 748
Receive ID 768
Functional Addr 1E
Functional Name 4WD
